subcodes.first_line: The Hour hath come to pass, and the Self-Subsisting hath appeared and proclaimeth: "There is none other God but Me, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد قامت القیمه و ظهر القائم و القیوم ینادی لا اله الا انا المهیمن القیوم و الذی قام
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
